---
title: Container Type Index Utilities
---

## Overview

Container/element type metadata for DataManager lives under `src/DataManager/utils/` in the `WhiskerToolbox::TypeTraits` namespace:

- `ContainerElementMapping.hpp` — compile-time `ContainerFor` / `ElementFor` traits
- `ContainerTypeIndex.hpp` / `.cpp` — runtime `TypeIndexMapper` (`std::type_index`, strings)
- `DataTypeIndexBridge.hpp` / `.cpp` — `DM_DataType` ↔ `std::type_index`

TransformsV2 consumes these utilities; it no longer defines its own `ContainerTraits`.

## Float ambiguity

`float` elements map to `RaggedAnalogTimeSeries` by default (`ContainerFor<float>`, `TypeIndexMapper::elementToContainer`). Contextual resolution to `AnalogTimeSeries` is performed in transform type-chain logic (`TypeChainResolver`).

## Related

- `TypeTraits/DataTypeTraits.hpp` — per-container `DataTraits` on data object classes
- `DataManager/utils/TimeSeriesConcepts.hpp` — element interface concepts (`time()`, `id()`, etc.)
